name: Amazon Competitor Analysis
description: Analyze Amazon competitors from ASINs, product links, or messy pasted text. Evaluate image strategy as a conversion funnel: main image attracts clicks, feature images explain selling points, and detail images reduce buyer doubts.

workflows.name: [工具] Analyze Amazon competitors orchestrator v2
workflows.notes: Validated v4 orchestrator. Keeps one main entrypoint, dispatches owned/competitor item evidence jobs, then performs one run-level market synthesis with a canonical scoring model and exact-key score normalization. It tolerates item or synthesis failures, gates Wiki publish through reportQa, and publishes the same marketSynthesis to Wiki and HTML/MinIO artifacts.

workflows.name: [子工作流] Analyze one Amazon competitor item v2
workflows.notes: Analyzes one owned or competitor Listing with amazon-item-evidence-v4, validates the business schema, preserves evidenceRefs and role-aware opportunity/risk semantics, uses Decodo/Gemini/final-analysis caches, and upserts the evidence package into amazon_competitor_analysis_items keyed by runId / ownAsin / competitorAsin.

workflows.name: [MCP入口] Amazon competitor analysis webhook v2
workflows.notes: Validated wrapper. Hybrid defaults to async unless mode=sync is explicitly requested, returning runId quickly while v2 continues in the background.

workflows.name: [工具] Query Amazon competitor analysis run v2
workflows.notes: Read-only status endpoint. Input runId; returns run row, item rows, failure reasons, Wiki links, HTML links, and artifact status from Data Tables.

workflows.name: [子工作流] Publish Amazon competitor HTML report
workflows.notes: Downloads selected main/product/A+ images, uploads them to MinIO, generates responsive latest and immutable run HTML, shared CSS, manifest.json, and report-data.json, and returns artifact URLs/status. Image download failures use placeholder SVGs without aborting the report.

workflows.name: Analyze images with Gemini proxy
workflows.notes: Per-image Gemini visual analysis using amazon-visual-v4 with role-aware main/gallery/A+ criteria, competitor borrowablePatterns, URL normalization, strict JSON, positive/negative cache reuse, and cache observability.

workflows.name: [工具] Query Amazon image analysis cache
workflows.notes: Reads reusable Gemini image-analysis cache entries without invoking the model.

workflows.name: [维护] Clean Amazon competitor analysis caches
workflows.notes: Deletes Listing rows after staleUntil, final-analysis rows 48 hours after expiresAt, and image rows 7 days after expiresAt. Invoked calls default to dry-run and require dryRun=false plus confirmDelete=true for real deletion.

defaults.focus: 价格带、卖点、主图吸引点击、功能图讲清卖点、细节图降低疑虑、A+页面、关键词、切入策略
